channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇮🇷🇰🇼 Iran Strikes Kuwait Airport, Killing One as Ceasefire Tested
item.description: Iran launched drone strikes on Kuwait's main airport, killing one person and injuring dozens. Tehran said the attack was retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island, as Trump stated ceasefire talks are ongoing.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Ukrainian Drones Hit St Petersburg Oil Terminal Ahead of Economic Forum
item.description: Ukrainian drones struck oil storage facilities near St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum was set to open. The attack comes days before the Russian president is scheduled to address the event.

item.title: 🇬🇧✈️ Three British Navy Personnel Killed in Helicopter Crash During Training
item.description: An investigation is underway after three British navy personnel died in a helicopter crash during a training exercise near Sourton in Devon, England.

item.title: 🦠🇨🇩 DRC Ebola Outbreak May Have Started as Early as January, WHO Says
item.description: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus said the Ebola virus 'had a big head start' in the Democratic Republic of Congo, with the outbreak potentially beginning months ago. The virus is spreading across borders.

item.title: 🇲🇿🇿🇦 Mozambique Says Five Citizens Killed in Xenophobic Attacks in South Africa
item.description: Mozambique reported that five of its citizens were killed in xenophobic attacks in South Africa, highlighting ongoing regional tensions over migration and violence.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇧🇷 China Clears Brazilian Beef Despite Foot-and-Mouth Disease Quota Limits
item.description: China has approved Brazilian beef imports despite concerns over foot-and-mouth disease, with quota limitations affecting profit margins for exporters.

item.title: 🛡️ US Tells Europe, Canada to Boost NATO Air and Naval Forces
item.description: The United States has urged European allies and Canada to increase their contributions to NATO air and naval capabilities amid growing security concerns.

item.title: 🎯 NATO Range in Latvia Shows Europe's Counter-Drone Progress and Gaps
item.description: Testing at a NATO facility in Latvia reveals both advances and challenges in European counter-drone capabilities as threats from unmanned systems grow.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦 EU Fund Unblocked to Help Ukraine Plug Air Defense Gaps
item.description: A newly unblocked EU fund offers hope for Ukraine to address critical air defense shortages as Russian attacks continue.

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iran-Backed Militias in Iraq to Hand Over Weapons to Authorities
item.description: Powerful Iran-backed militias in Iraq have announced they will begin handing over weapons to government authorities, a significant development in efforts to assert state control.

item.title: 🚀 Blue Origin Rocket Explosion Spares Fuel Tanks, Key Launch Pad Parts
item.description: Blue Origin reported that its rocket explosion spared critical fuel tanks and key launch pad infrastructure, as investigation into the incident continues.

item.title: 🌌 NASA Declares Mars Maven Spacecraft Dead After Six Months of Silence
item.description: NASA has officially declared its Mars MAVEN spacecraft non-operational after six months without communication, ending a mission that studied the Martian atmosphere.

item.title: 🇳🇬 Shell Pumped Oil Through Nigeria Pipeline Despite Pollution Evidence
item.description: Documents reveal that Shell continued pumping oil through a Nigerian pipeline for years despite evidence of pollution, the oil giant says the documents ignore critical context.

item.title: 🔥 Foreign Nationals Among 21 Killed in Delhi Fire
item.description: Many victims of a deadly fire in Delhi were South Asians who had travelled to India for treatment or to accompany relatives, officials said.

item.title: 🇳🇴 Norway Becomes Ninth Country to Join French Nuclear Deterrence Pact
item.description: Norway has become the ninth country to sign onto France's nuclear deterrence framework, as European nations seek alternatives amid faltering trust in US security commitments.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Threatens to Fire Officials Over Patriot Missile Supply Delays
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelensky has threatened to dismiss officials responsible for delays in Patriot missile supplies, highlighting ongoing challenges in air defense procurement.

item.title: 🚢 Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Vessel Carrying Guided Missiles
item.description: Ukrainian military released video showing drones striking a Russian vessel carrier of guided missile weapons, demonstrating continued attacks on Russian naval assets.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden Prepares Prisons for 13-Year-Old Gang Killers
item.description: Sweden is preparing its prison system to handle an influx of young gang members, including children as young as 13 involved in violent crime.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Says Deadly Attack on Kuwait Should Serve as Lesson for US
item.description: Iran stated that its deadly attack on Kuwait should serve as a lesson for the United States, amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇬🇭 Ghana Passes Sweeping Law Criminalizing LGBTQ+ Activity
item.description: Ghana has passed sweeping legislation criminalizing LGBTQ+ activity, with people described as 'panicking' over the new law's implications.

item.title: 💰 US Announces New Tariffs Over Forced Labor Concerns
item.description: The US has announced new tariffs following concerns over forced labor, after the Supreme Court struck down many of Trump's previous duties in February.

item.title: 🔥 Migrant Workers Burned Alive in Car in Italy
item.description: Migrant workers were reportedly burned alive in their car in a violent attack in Italy, highlighting ongoing tensions over migration and labor.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Henry Nowak Murder Sparks Protests in UK
item.description: The murder of Henry Nowak has sparked protests in the UK, with right-wing groups claiming 'two-tier' policing disadvantages white people.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drones Hit St Petersburg Oil Facilities
item.description: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near St Petersburg, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the city's economic forum.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Viktor Orban Ordered Seizure of Ukrainian Gold Shipment
item.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban ordered the seizure of a Ukrainian gold shipment, according to reports.
